_provenance.extraction_method: Playwright (Chromium, 1440x900 @ 2x DPR, networkidle + 1.5s settle); logo color sampled from PNG via PIL.
synthesized_inputs: color role names (Wavelength, Console, Foam, Drafting, Canvas) — invented from agency/wave subject matter, not labeled on source
typography.heading.lineHeight and letterSpacing — captured from computed styles but expressed as ratios/em
typography.eyebrow rules — inferred from observed uppercase Inter 600 12.48px nav and CTA tags
typography.accent — page has no italic display accent in use; field set null rather than invented
voice.character, traits, antiTraits — composed from extracted copy patterns (warmth + craft language); not labelled on source
voice.examples.dont — LLM-composed counter-examples to match extracted voice rules
tone.description, writingGoals, cleverVsClear — inferred from copy
contentPillars — derived from nav (Development, Design, BigCommerce & Shopify, Team, Blog) and case-study language
personas — not enumerated on source; left empty
photography.rules and donts — generalised from the single hero (laptop + people in workspace under teal wash)
logo.clearSpace, logo.donts — not stated on source; suggested standard defaults
motifs descriptions/usage — observed visually in screenshots, descriptive language is composed
_provenance.note: Captured as-is for a design refresh. The wave mark, soft teal, lowercase wordmark, and big light-weight headings are the recognisable bones to preserve or evolve. Inter 300 in display sizes and 0px border radii are the dated parts most likely to change in the refresh.

name: Modelic
philosophy: A full-spectrum design and development agency that cultivates smart strategies for branding, UX, e-commerce, and web accessibility — partners in sustainable growth, not a vending machine.

logo.clearSpace: Maintain clear space equal to the cap height of the wordmark on all sides.
donts: Do not place the wordmark on backgrounds that obscure the wave mark's teal accent.
Do not stretch, recolor the wordmark to non-Console values, or separate the wave from the wordmark in horizontal lockup.
Do not set the lockup smaller than 96px wide on screen — the inter-wave detail collapses.

primary.name: Wavelength Teal
primary.use: logo accent wave, hero overlay base, illustrative tint, soft panels behind numerals

primary.name: Console
primary.use: wordmark and wave silhouette, headlines, body ink, CTA fill, footer ground

primary.name: Canvas
primary.use: page ground, copy on Console, content cards

secondary.name: Foam
secondary.use: hero photo wash, soft tenet panel grounds

secondary.name: Drafting
secondary.use: header on scroll, neutral panel ground separating sections

web.name: Footer Whisper
web.use: footer body copy on Console (rendered as rgba(255,255,255,0.4))

borderRadius.usage: Sharp, unrounded corners on buttons, cards, and image frames — a deliberate counterpoint to the curved wave mark.

patterns.name: Primary (Console-filled)
patterns.style: background #242424; color #FFFFFF; border-radius 0; padding ~14px 20px; Inter 600; 12.48px; uppercase; letter-spacing ~0.08em

patterns.name: Eyebrow link
patterns.style: background transparent; color #242424; padding 9.36px 0; Inter 600; 12.48px; uppercase; no border, no radius

patterns.name: Nav item
patterns.style: background transparent; color #242424; padding 9.36px 12.48px; Inter 600; 12.48px; uppercase

motifs.name: Modelic wave
motifs.description: Two interleaved sine curves forming a wordmark glyph — Console-black silhouette with a Wavelength-teal accent wave riding behind it. Reads as oscillation, signal, model + logic.
motifs.usage: Always paired with the wordmark in the primary lockup. May be lifted as a standalone graphic mark at small sizes (favicon, app icon) or animated subtly on first load. Do not separate from the wordmark in horizontal lockup contexts.

motifs.name: Pale teal photo wash
motifs.description: Hero and case-study photography sits beneath a translucent Foam (#CCE4E4) overlay, with a faint waveform / orbital line pattern on top. Effect is dreamy, considered, agency-calm.
motifs.usage: Hero sections and case-study openers. Avoid on portrait close-ups where skin tones should read true.

motifs.name: Display numerals
motifs.description: Tenets and process steps marked with very large Inter 300 numerals (1, 2, 3) set inside Foam panels and offset against Console copy.
motifs.usage: Any list-of-N section: principles, process steps, services. One numeral per panel, set generously.

motifs.name: Lowercase wordmark
motifs.description: The wordmark is always set lowercase, no exceptions. The brand name in running copy follows the page's title-case convention but the wordmark itself is fixed lowercase.
motifs.usage: Logo lockups only. Sentence-case 'Modelic' is correct in body copy.

heading.usage: Section H2s at ~47px; subhead H3s at ~28px. Light weight is intentional — gives an airy, considered tone. The refresh will likely tighten this; the current state runs Inter 300 large which feels dated in 2026.

subheading.usage: H3 below H2 hero or case-study panel — ~28px / 1.44 line-height.

body.usage: 18–23px body. Light weight body is unusual; pairs with light headings for a consistent airy register.

accent.usage: No italic display accent in use on the current site.

eyebrow.usage: Nav, CTAs, and eyebrow tags at 12.48px with letter-spacing ~0.08em. The single shift to Inter 600 marks structural scaffolding (nav, action) against the otherwise Inter-300 page.

button.usage: Same recipe as eyebrow — uppercase, 12.48px, letter-spaced. No mixed case in CTAs.

rules: All CTAs and nav items are uppercase Inter 600 at ~12.48px.
Headlines and body share Inter 300 — the brand reads as tonally flat in weight; structural emphasis comes from size and the 600 eyebrow only.
The wordmark is lowercase and uses a heavier custom-feeling sans (rounded, geometric) that is heavier than Inter 600 — treat it as a discrete asset, not as set type.
Body copy runs at full ink (no opacity reduction).

photography.style: Workspace and team-in-context: people at laptops, focused, shot from a slightly elevated angle. Cool color cast. Editorial calm, not stocky.
rules: Always overlay hero imagery with the Foam wash and a subtle waveform line graphic.
Subjects are mid-action (typing, sketching) rather than posed.
Cool to neutral light. Avoid warm golden-hour tones — they fight the teal.
donts: No isolated product shots on white.
No stock-feeling handshakes, conference rooms, or generic 'team in a meeting' setups.
No saturated brand colors imported from clients into Modelic-owned imagery.

voice.character: A craft agency that talks plainly, with quiet confidence. The voice is partner-first, slightly self-effacing, and earnest about communication.

do.text: Modelic is a full-spectrum design and development agency that cultivates smart strategies for branding, UX, e-commerce, and web accessibility.
do.context: Names what we do without superlatives. 'Cultivates' lands warmer than 'delivers' or 'drives'.

do.text: We are not a vending machine. We want to be your partners in sustainable growth.
do.context: Self-effacing line that defines the relationship by naming what we won't be.
Process page tenet — clean declarative, no marketing fizz.

do.text: Hire us because we excel in something you cannot do. We'll utilize our skills to complement your areas of expertise.
do.context: Acknowledges client's strengths first, ours second.

do.text: We are here to support your narrative. Let's work together to tell your story and celebrate what makes your company unique.
do.context: Partner-first phrasing. 'Support your narrative' is the agency posture.

dont.text: We're a world-class digital agency delivering best-in-class solutions.
dont.context: Generic superlatives — exactly the agency-speak the brand defines itself against.

dont.text: Unlock explosive growth with our proprietary methodology.
dont.context: Hype + jargon. The brand's self-effacing register makes 'unlock' and 'explosive' feel like another voice entirely.

dont.text: Submit your project request and our team will respond within 24 hours.
dont.context: Vending-machine framing — exactly the relationship the brand says it isn't.

rules: Lead with the partnership, not the deliverable.
Plain verbs over agency verbs: 'help', 'build', 'design' beats 'leverage', 'deliver', 'drive'.
If a sentence could appear on a competitor agency's site verbatim, rewrite it.
Self-effacing lines are part of the voice — keep them.
Title-case headlines ('Our Tenets for Partnerships'); sentence-case body. Wordmark stays lowercase.

tone.description: Tone stays calm and partner-minded across contexts. Process pages are declarative; case studies are story-led; contact copy is warm and specific (real phone number, real hours).

writingGoals.description: Position Modelic as a collaborator inside the client's team, not a supplier across the table.
Honor the client's expertise; bring our craft to complement, not replace.

writingGoals.goal: To be findable in plain language
writingGoals.description: Real phone number, real hours, real services. No cute placeholders.

cleverVsClear.clever: Sparingly — the 'we are not a vending machine' line is the brand's allowance for a touch of wit. One per page.
cleverVsClear.clear: Default. Service nav, process tenets, contact lines, and CTAs are all plainly labelled.

contentPillars.name: Development
contentPillars.description: Engineering for e-commerce platforms (Shopify, BigCommerce, WordPress) and accessibility-conformant builds.

contentPillars.name: Design
contentPillars.description: Branding, UX, and visual design that complements the engineering work.

contentPillars.name: E-commerce
contentPillars.description: Conversion-focused commerce work — case studies are framed as 'Conversion Case Study'.

contentPillars.name: The People
contentPillars.description: Team-led stories. Modelic frames the agency as a group of passionate, energetic, creative people.

contentPillars.name: Tenets / Process
contentPillars.description: How we partner. The four-tenet structure (Communication, Partners not vendors, Complement expertise, Support narrative) is a recurring spine.
